0.description: Users want to build straightforward applications for coordination, booking, and service requests, prioritizing speed and simplicity.

1.use_case: Secure Secret Management with Environment Variables
1.description: Users are reminded to avoid hardcoding sensitive information and instead utilize environment variables for secure secret management.

2.description: Users want to import data from CSV files and map the fields to existing data structures within the system.

3.description: Users report inconsistent and random behavior when saving tags, hindering their ability to ship products reliably.

4.description: Users are experiencing incorrect spacing and overlapping elements, specifically headers and lists, on mobile devices.

5.description: Users are requesting essential features like admin tools, communication, and task management capabilities.

6.description: Users perceive the current UI as crowded and request simplification for a better user experience.

7.use_case: Platform Integrations for Auth and DB
7.description: Users are exploring integrating authentication and database services with various third-party platforms like GitHub, Netlify, Vercel, and Slack.

8.description: Users are concerned about potential issues with Cross-Origin Resource Sharing and redirects when implementing authentication.

9.description: Users frequently report 401 authentication errors occurring after a refresh, often with apologies for repeated communication.

10.description: Users require distinct access levels, differentiating between administrators and normal users.

11.description: Users inquire about the app's ability to integrate with their existing third-party platforms and services like Firebase, n8n, or Webhooks.

12.use_case: Basic Usage Stats and Funnel Analytics
12.description: Users want to track fundamental usage metrics and analyze user conversion funnels within the product.

13.description: Users need custom applications to streamline internal operations, manage data, and automate workflows across various business functions.

14.description: Users expect the product to function flawlessly and without glitches when used in the Safari web browser.

15.description: Users report a painful table view experience on various devices like MacBook, Chromebook, and Android, seeking improvements.

16.description: This use case addresses how the system handles duplicate records when users import data from CSV files.

17.description: Users want to quickly prototype and build various custom business applications for specific operational needs.

18.description: Users want to export data from a filtered view into a CSV file for further analysis or sharing.

19.description: Users require audit logs to track who made changes, what was changed, and when these modifications occurred.

20.description: Users inquire about the perceived difficulty of integrating various new features and functionalities into the product.

21.description: Users are experiencing a persistent redirect loop immediately after logging in, preventing access to the application.

22.description: Users frequently forget where to find specific announcements, content calendars, or other product features.

23.description: Users request improvements to the visual design and overall user experience of empty states to make them more engaging and less 'sad'.

24.description: Users prefer deploying applications on managed cloud platforms like Fly.io or Render, avoiding self-hosting complexities.

25.description: Users are consistently requesting the addition of a dark mode toggle for improved visual comfort and preference.

26.description: Users are requesting to plan for the future implementation of Two-Factor Authentication, not an immediate deployment.

27.use_case: GitHub Sync for Developer PR Reviews
27.description: Users request GitHub synchronization to enable developers to review Pull Requests directly, streamlining code review processes.

28.description: This use case highlights the significant mobile usage among users, with a strong preference for MacBook devices.

29.description: Users are expressing significant frustration and difficulty, questioning the product's usability and their own sanity due to perceived complexity.
